entry.title: @Heather Dubrow playing my mom? Too perfect. #rhoc #mom

entry.title: My cover of the Joke (live) is now streaming on all platforms. Thank you to @Brandi Carlile for this incredible song and @Our Lady J for accompanying me ❤️❤️❤️ #singing #cover
entry.content: My cover of the Joke (live) is now streaming on all platforms. Thank you to @Brandi Carlile for this incredible song and @Our Lady J for accompanying me ❤️❤️❤️ #singing #cover

entry.title: “hold on” for @TrevorProject concert with @Carnie Wilson @lola bonfiglio<3 👯‍♀️❤️
entry.content: “hold on” for @TrevorProject concert with @Carnie Wilson @lola bonfiglio<3 👯‍♀️❤️

entry.title: Mob wife glam ? Headed to the opening of @reformation beverly hills then dinner with @PAPER Magazine 💋 #refbeverlyhills
entry.content: Mob wife glam ? Headed to the opening of @reformation beverly hills then dinner with @PAPER Magazine 💋 #refbeverlyhills

entry.title: Headed to opening night of @LEMPICKA on broadway 🖤@reformation @LaurelCharleston @zenobiateague

entry.title: Another accidental sex and the city cosplay i swear to god
entry.content: Another accidental sex and the city cosplay i swear to god

entry.title: @Kristin Chenoweth took me backstage at promises promises 14 years ago, and now I get to call her my friend all these years later as my real self 💓👯‍♀️🫶🏻
entry.content: @Kristin Chenoweth took me backstage at promises promises 14 years ago, and now I get to call her my friend all these years later as my real self 💓👯‍♀️🫶🏻
